title: Milestone: Exchange first LICHEN packets over LoRa
description: Demonstrate bidirectional LICHEN packets over physical LoRa radios using the baseline local protocol. Validate PHY configuration, link framing, immediate-sender authentication, replay handling, and at least one native 0200::/8 /128 application exchange without requiring global Yggdrasil participation.
acceptance_criteria: Two physical supported boards exchange authenticated LICHEN packets over LoRa in both directions; capture and decode the frames; verify native /128 source/destination handling and replay rejection; record hardware, firmware commits, regional plan, RSSI/SNR, and test evidence.
